headline: Deckers Outdoor Corp (NYSE:DECK): Mixed Earnings With EPS Beat, Revenue Miss And Tepid Guidance Weigh On Stock
summary: Deckers Outdoor reported Q1 FY2027 EPS of $0.94, beating estimates, but revenue of $1.02B slightly missed. HOKA and UGG drove growth, though guidance trails consensus, sending shares down 3.4% after hours.

headline: UGG® Celebrates Back-to-School With a Campaign Championing Self-Expression Through the Arts
summary: SANTA BARBARA, Calif., July 23, 2026--Southern California-based global lifestyle brand UGG® (a division of Deckers Brands [NYSE: DECK]) is showing up in a big way this Back-to-School season, redefining what it means to head back to the classroom with a collection that blends craftsmanship, quality, and artistic self-expression. headline: Deckers Outdoor Likely To Report Lower Q1 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
summary: Deckers Outdoor Corp (NYSE: DECK) to release Q1 earnings on July 23, with analysts expecting EPS of 87 cents and revenue of $1.02B. . Benzinga's top analysts have given it a buy rating.
